title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MT Educare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MT Educare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the MT Educare family as a Curriculum Developer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!
